title: Tender Irish Beef Toast
description: Savor the flavors of Ireland with this tender beef toast dish, featuring snow peas and served as a delicious solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Garlic-infused olive oil (2 tbsp)
ingredients.notes: For sautéing beef and snow peas

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use to season beef and snow peas

ingredients.name: Freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use to season beef and snow peas

ingredients.name: Toasted Irish bread (1 slice)
ingredients.notes: For serving with beef and snow peas

instructions: Season the Irish beef with salt and black pepper. Heat garlic-infused olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the beef for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 8-10 minutes or until cooked to your liking.
While the beef is cooking, heat a small amount of garlic-infused olive oil in the same skillet. Add the snow peas and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Toast the Irish bread until lightly browned. Top with the cooked beef, snow peas, and shredded Irish cheddar cheese.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
